financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is making more money overall, but it's spending a lot on new projects which is affecting profits.
Food delivery isn't growing as fast, and competition in quick deliveries is making it harder to earn money.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Critical
bullets: The company is struggling to make money because other businesses are offering similar services at lower prices.
They are having trouble finding good locations for new stores, which could slow down their growth and increase costs.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing okay but has room to improve its environmental and social practices.
They are not leading in responsible actions, but they're not falling behind either.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Good
bullets: The company's leaders showed a mix of carefulness and confidence when talking about future plans.
Even when questioned, they stayed steady and sure about handling challenges and competition.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Very Poor
bullets: The company often avoided giving clear answers and specific numbers about their costs and plans.
When asked for detailed financial information, they tended to give vague responses instead of direct answers.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Very Poor
bullets: The company is facing challenges right now, making it a risky choice for investors.
While they hope to grow in the future, current problems are slowing them down.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Average
bullets: The company is growing, but not as fast as it hoped, which makes it less exciting to buy right now.
Even though there are challenges, the company is strong and plans to grow, so it might do better in the future.
